questions.question: Explain the difference between a max heap and a min heap. Provide an example to illustrate your explanation.
Write a step-by-step algorithm to convert a binary search tree (BST) into a max heap. Ensure that the time complexity of your algorithm is O(n log n).
Prove that Heapsort is an efficient sorting algorithm with a time complexity of O(n log n). Use the proof by induction method and consider the stability of Heapsort.
